entries.content: Classic experiments like Milgram's obedience study and Stanford Prison Experiment revealed situational power over behavior. Applications include reducing prejudice and improving group decision-making..

entries.content: Behavioral neuroscience links brain function to behavior and mental processes. Neurotransmitters like dopamine and serotonin influence mood, motivation, and cognition. Brain imaging techniques reveal neural correlates of psychological phenomena. Plasticity shows the brain changes with experience throughout life. Understanding brain-behavior relationships advances treatment of mental illness and enhances human performance.
